commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The PR needs author repair, after-fix real behavior proof, and maintainer security/product approval; those blockers are not a safe automated repair lane.; Needs attention: The patch introduces plaintext persistence of live login cookies and currently can resurrect stale cookies after a successful empty snapshot.; Review finding: [P1] Clear stale cookie snapshots on successful empty saves — extensions/browser/... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds CDP-based managed Chrome cookie snapshot/restore, periodic and stop-time flushing, focused browser tests, and CLI docs for a new `cookies.json` sidecar.

PR surface: Source +136, Tests +167, Docs +4. Total +307 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR-introduced defect: source shows a successful `Storage.getCookies` empty result returns before touching `cookies.json`, and the new test asserts the stale sidecar remains. I did not run Chrome locally in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs author repair, after-fix real behavior proof, and maintainer security/product approval; those blockers are not a safe automated repair lane.
